title: Automating population of another date field based on a specific date column (For sub-item))

posts.author: leonardlai (Leonard Lai)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have this following board setup, my requirements are :

image1138×378 40.2 KB

  • Based on the “Launch Date” column, i need to automate populating “Copywriter Deadline” & “Designer Deadline” (All date columns)
  • “Copywriter Deadline” & “Designer Deadline” can have different deadline, example Copywriter deadline is 3 days before launch date, while Designer can be 5 days before deadline
  • I have actually found a automation that potentially (screenshot below) could satisfy the requirement. However very unfortunately, this automation does not work with Sub-item dates column :

image1387×442 17.8 KB

Hence, I would like to find out if there are any other automation that could work with sub-item date columns. Preferably not paid external app as we are already paying enterprise pricing for Monday.com. Or appreciate it if there are other workaround solutions.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Since you have Enterprise, you can do this with workflow center.

image1170×675 46.1 KB

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: leonardlai (Leonard Lai)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Clover_Gal ,

Thank you for pointing me to this new feature. I am aware of this workflow center - though not really sure what it can do. Let me play around with this.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Awesome! Feel free to reply if you need some more info
